lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Coriolis
sources.what: Interactive outfitting & build planner — used to validate the cargo-maximised trade fit, laden jump range and the shield-versus-cargo trade-off.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous (official)
sources.what: Frontier's official Krait Phantom ship page — manufacturer, feature overview, and the ship render used on this page.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Authoritative slot layout — hardpoint counts, optional-internal sizes and core ratings behind the cargo-capacity figures here.

sources.label: Inara — Krait Phantom
sources.what: Per-ship reference — base stats, hull price and module slot layout cross-checked for the trade-fit cargo numbers.

sources.label: Fandom wiki
sources.what: Krait Phantom hull profile and internal layout — corroborates the medium-pad, rank-free, cargo-capacity profile.

sources.label: YouTube — Obsidian Ant
sources.what: Release-window overview of the Krait Phantom, covering its range, speed and cargo capacity versus the heavier Krait Mk II.
